flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Missouri Baptist University rose 21% between 2006 and 2009 ($14.7k → $17.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Missouri Baptist University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($30.5k → $34.6k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Missouri Baptist University fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (72.6% → 65.3%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Missouri Baptist University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).
